title: Halo HUD
description: Adds a small halo style indicator around the crosshair, showing player health and hunger without having to look away from the screen center.
body:
Halo HUD is a Minecraft mod for the Fabric launcher adding a small halo
style indicator around the crosshair, showing player health and hunger.

This allows players to quickly see the state of their character without
looking down at the HUD, particularly on large monitors.

**HaloHUD >= 2.0 requires YetAnotherConfigLib instead of ClothConfig!**


The indicator automatically hides itself when the bars are full.

## Dependencies

* Optional dependency on [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) for ingame configuration screen

### Fabric only
* requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
* optional: [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for ingame configuration screen


## Mod compatibility
This should be compatible with any mod that doesn't also draw something around the crosshair.

Works very well in conjunction with my other mod [AutoHud](https://modrinth.com/mod/autohud).
Also works well with my mod [Dynamic Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair).
